$comment: Elixpo Pay catalog for blogs.elixpo. Source of truth for the central catalog (payouts.elixpo.com). Edit here, then `npm run sync:tiers` to push. Representative tiers only: India (INR) + global headline (USD T1). PPP bands (T2/T3) stay blogs-side and apply at checkout via currency.

products.name: Blogs Member
products.description: Member-only reads, higher limits, and creator pool eligibility.

products.name: Blogs Team
products.description: Everything in Member for the whole org — unlimited seats, private orgs, team analytics.
